sections.paragraph:
Original: איתן

Transliteration: 'êythân

Phonetic: ay-thawn'

BDB Definition:

  1. perpetual, constant, perennial, ever-flowing
    1. ever-flowing (of a stream)
    2. permanence, permanent, enduring (figuratively)

Origin: from an unused root (meaning to continue)

TWOT entry: 935a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
